message:
feat(net): add database client and messaging/broker subsystems

Closes bd-yx9r.11.1 and bd-yx9r.11.3.

- Add db.h/db.c: connection pool, query execution, transaction lifecycle
  (begin/commit/rollback), result set with cursor navigation, column
  indexing, typed values (null/int/text/float). 9 tests.
- Add messaging.h/messaging.c: message type, bounded FIFO queue with
  push/poll, pub/sub topic with fan-out, broker with topic management.
  10 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -194,7 +194,9 @@ NET_SRC := \
 	src/net/server.c \
 	src/net/http.c \
 	src/net/web.c \
-	src/net/grpc.c
+	src/net/grpc.c \
+	src/net/db.c \
+	src/net/messaging.c
 
 BYTES_SRC := \
 	src/bytes/buf.c \
